# Borrow-from-LEFT — after remove(80). Order m=3.
#
# ch underflows; left sibling cg=[55,60] lends: parent key 70 drops into ch and
# 60 (max of cg) rises into the parent. c becomes [50,60].
#
#                       [30]
#                     /      \
#               [10,20]       [50,60]
#              /   |   \      /   |    \
#           [5] [15] [25] [40] [55] [70]
root 1
1  1  2  30 3
2  2  4  10 5  20 6
3  2  7  50 8  60 9
4  1  0  5 0
5  1  0  15 0
6  1  0  25 0
7  1  0  40 0
8  1  0  55 0
9  1  0  70 0
